nasb.text: “Surely no one can refuse the water for these to be baptized who have received the Holy Spirit just as we did, can he?”

esv.text: “Can anyone withhold water for baptizing these people, who have received the Holy Spirit just as we have?”

cnv.text: “這些人既然領受了聖靈，跟我們一樣，誰能禁止他們受水的洗禮呢？”

ccb.text: “既然这些人已经和我们一样领受了圣灵，谁能阻止他们接受洗礼呢？”

csbs.text: “这些人就像我们一样也领受了圣灵，到底谁能阻止用水给他们施洗呢？”
